goals: Convert architectural measurement units from metric to imperial for a room renovation project
Look up the formula for calculating the area of an irregular quadrilateral needed for floor planning
Solve a practical geometry problem using the retrieved formula
Generate practice problems to improve geometry skills for future architectural projects

user_agent_config.personality: A patient and persistent individual with varied interests who enjoys learning new things when motivated by practical projects. Tends to explore tools methodically.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Has basic math knowledge from school but has forgotten many formulas. Does not know tool names or internal APIs. Learns by doing and asking questions.

end_condition: The user has completed all four goals: converted the needed units, found the relevant formula, solved the practical geometry problem, and generated practice material for future learning.
